---
name: New Tool Request
about: Request support for a new tool
title: "[Tool] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Tool name**
e.g. `mytool`

**How to detect it**
e.g. `command -v mytool`

**Update command**
e.g. `mytool update --yes`

**Platforms**
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Both

**Non-interactive?**
Does the update command complete without stdin prompts? (required for sup)

**Install methods**
How is this tool typically installed? (brew, npm, pip, binary, etc.)

**Notes**
Any special considerations (needs sudo, long timeout, etc.)
